---
title: "Rāg Iman kalyāṅ"
format: html
---

## Songs in this collection

----

- [Baṅgari mori murakai](chapters/bangari_mori_murakai.qmd)

- [Caturaṅga rasa sana](chapters/caturanga_rasa_sana.qmd)

- [śankara śiva pinākī](chapters/sankara_siva.qmd)

- [śyāma ko daraśana](chapters/syama_ko_darsana.qmd)
